headline: Southern Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Southern (NYSE:SO) reported first-quarter 2026 adjusted earnings per share of $1.32, exceeding management’s estimate and rising $0.09 from the prior-year period, driven by customer growth and increased usage across its regulated electric utilities.
